hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); echo "$INPUT" >> /tmp/claude-hook-debug.json; PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt // .message // .user_message // .content // empty'); printf "
---
## User (%s)

%s
" "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')" "$PROMPT" >> /Users/julia/Documents/research_agent_framework_assessment/prompt-log.md 2>/dev/null || true
